title: Auto fill template
excerpt: Is there a way to auto fill a document template (in the old days, we used Filemaker Pro)?

posts.author: rupertnevedesigns (Temple Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to auto fill a document template (in the old days, we used Filemaker Pro)?

posts.author: cassievaughn (Cassie Vaughn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rupertnevedesigns !

If you are looking to auto-fill particular values on your monday.com board, I would recommend using our “Default Value” capabilities.

This article would be most helpful: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005319105-The-Basics-of-Items?abcb=92888

Scroll down to the “Setting a default value for your item” section.

If you are looking to autofill all values in a board, like a pre-built template, I would recommend using our templates capabilities. Read more here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001362625-Does-monday-com-offer-templates-?abcb=40997

I hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
